induced_prompt: Write sentences with a single center-embedded relative clause, where a noun phrase is modified by a clause before the main verb completes the sentence (e.g., "NP1 NP2 VERB VERB"). Use only one level of embedding — do not nest relative clauses inside other relative clauses.
